languages.title: Language
languages.subtitle: Choose the language used throughout the app.

phone.label: Phone number
phone.searchCountry: Search country, code, or dialing prefix
phone.tooShort: This phone number is too short.
phone.tooLong: This phone number is too long.
phone.invalid: Enter a valid phone number for the selected country.

auth.onboardingTagline: A personal safety companion for the moments between “I’m fine” and “I need help.”
auth.createSubtitle: Choose a sign-in method to protect your safety graph.
auth.signInFailedMessage: We could not complete sign-in. Check your connection and try again.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Using a local development session. Native Google Sign-In works in a development build.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Pair now or continue and add it later.
auth.northStarBody: The VL01 wearable can trigger safety flows with taps and long press gestures.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Your gentle safety companion on the map and in calls.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear can help with home mode, guardian mode, emergency mode, excuse calls, and voice support.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Used for the map, danger zones, safe arrival, and SOS context.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving asks for location so guardians can understand where help may be needed. You can change this later in Settings.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Notifications support check-ins and emergency events.
permissions.notificationsBody: We only use notifications for safety prompts, emergency updates, and reminders you enable.
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving uses your location for the safety map, danger zones, quick share, and SOS context. You can change this later in Settings.
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving sends check-in reminders, emergency updates, and safety prompts you enable. We do not use notifications for ads.
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving uses your microphone only when you start an AI companion or safety call.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving uses Bluetooth to pair with NorthStar jewelry, read connection status, and trigger safety flows from the wearable.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving uses the camera only when you choose to take a profile photo or share a safety image.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving keeps this flow available from Settings and the dashboard.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Pick the companion voice that feels safest to hear.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Five taps can escalate to SOS and guardian alerts.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Create a graceful reason to leave an uncomfortable situation.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Start a real-time companion call when you need support.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Try the safety flows in a low-pressure demo.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Keep the jewelry nearby while scanning.
jewelry.noDevices: No nearby NorthStar devices found yet.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth scanning could not start. Please try again.
jewelry.scanFailed: We could not find nearby jewelry. Check Bluetooth, keep NorthStar close, and try again.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth scanning could not start. Check Bluetooth access and try again.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Nearby-device access is off. Allow Bluetooth access in Settings, then try again.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar took too long to connect. Move it closer and try again.
jewelry.connectFailed: We could not connect to NorthStar. Check that it is charged and nearby, then try again.
jewelry.emptyMessage: Keep NorthStar charged and close to this phone, then scan again.

home.subtitle: Safety companion dashboard
home.readyBody: Voice, map, jewelry, and guardians are one tap away.

map.title: Safety map
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go preview; Mapbox renders in a development build.
map.updateFailed: We could not update your location. Please try again.
map.notRequested: Location access was not requested. You can enable it later from Settings.
map.permissionOff: Location access is off. Enable it in Settings to center the safety map on you.
map.timeout: Your location is taking longer than expected. Move somewhere with a clearer signal and try again.
map.savedEmptyMessage: Trusted places you save will appear here for quick access.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.connectingSecurely: Connecting securely to your voice companion...
safetyCall.emptyMessage: Start the call or type a message when you are ready.

history.clearMessage: This removes saved AI companion messages from this device.
history.title: Conversation history
history.subtitle: AI companion messages saved on this device.
history.emptyMessage: Your AI companion conversations will appear here after your first call.
history.loadFailed: We could not load conversation history. Please try again.
history.clearFailed: We could not clear conversation history. Please try again.
history.deleteFailed: We could not delete that conversation. Please try again.

voices.title: My safety call voices
voices.subtitle: Choose the companion voice that feels right to hear.
voices.selectionFailedMessage: Please try choosing the voice again.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: This voice sample could not be played. Please try again.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Use bundled companion responses when the network or Hume credentials are unavailable.
settings.privacyBody: Export or delete the local data stored on this device.
settings.exportFailedMessage: Unable to export your data right now.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: This removes your profile, settings, emergency contacts, conversation history, permission reminders, and local auth session from this device.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: Unable to delete local data right now.
settings.updateFailedMessage: We could not save that preference. Please try again.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Your session is still active. Please try again.

contacts.title: Emergency contacts
contacts.subtitle: Trusted people available during safety flows.
contacts.name: Name
contacts.emptyMessage: Add someone you trust so they are ready when a safety flow needs them.
contacts.removeMessage: This person will no longer appear in your emergency flow.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: We could not save this contact. Check the details and try again.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: We could not remove this contact. Please try again.

friends.title: Friends
friends.subtitle: Guardians, requests, and emergency graph.
friends.emptyMessage: Trusted friends and guardians will appear here once they are added.

emergency.title: Emergency SOS
emergency.subtitle: Escalate only when you need immediate support.
emergency.body: This will notify your safety flow and prepare emergency contacts.
emergency.addContact: Add an emergency contact in Settings.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Share a one-time location snapshot through your device share sheet. It does not update after sending.

quickShare.title: Quick share
quickShare.subtitle: Share a one-time location snapshot. It does not update after sending.

capybearTap.title: Capybear tap
capybearTap.subtitle: Double-tap your NorthStar to drop a safety orange.
capybearTap.body: Gesture route is ready for BLE event wiring.

errors.voiceOffline: You seem offline. Your message will be sent when you reconnect.
errors.voiceQueued: Message saved. It will be sent when the voice companion reconnects.
errors.voiceRetrying: Trying to send your message again...
errors.voiceConnecting: Connecting securely to your voice companion...
errors.microphone: Microphone access is needed for voice calls. You can enable it in Settings, or type a message instead.
errors.billing: The online voice companion is temporarily unavailable. You can continue with the offline companion.
errors.authentication: The voice companion could not verify this session. Sign in again or use the offline companion for now.
errors.timeout: The voice companion took too long to respond. Check your connection and try again.
errors.network: We could not reach the voice companion. Check your connection, then try again or continue offline.
errors.genericVoice: Something interrupted the voice call. Try again, or continue with the offline companion.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving needs microphone access for safety and AI companion calls.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving uses your location for the safety map and nearby safety features.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving uses Bluetooth to connect to your NorthStar safety jewelry.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: This sign-in option is unavailable in this build.
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Demo mode uses local fake data only. Connected services are not authenticated, and this session resets when the app reloads.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: The verification code is invalid or expired. Request a new code and try again.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Too many sign-in attempts. Wait a moment, then try again.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Sign-in verification took too long. Check your connection and try again.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: We could not reach the sign-in service. Check your connection and try again.
releaseCritical.authSessionExpired: Your session expired. Sign in again.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: The safety map could not load. Check your connection and try again.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Live location is unavailable. Showing your last saved location from %{capturedAt}.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: We could not share your location. Check location access and try again.
releaseCritical.locationShareCurrent: Here is my location recorded at %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Here is my last saved location recorded at %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Bluetooth access is off. Enable it in Settings, then try again.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: Bluetooth is turned off. Turn it on, then try again.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Bluetooth pairing is unavailable on this device or build.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: We could not find NorthStar. Keep it close, check Bluetooth, and try again.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: No nearby NorthStar devices were found. Keep it close and scan again.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: We could not connect to NorthStar. Keep it charged and nearby, then try again.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: We could not save this place. Try again.
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: Phone dialer opened; call not confirmed.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: No emergency contact was available; no call was placed.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: The phone dialer could not open; no call was placed.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: The last SOS attempt could not be confirmed.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: The voice companion is unavailable right now. Try again later or continue with the offline companion.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.

wellness.title: Wellbeing & connected care
wellness.subtitle: Gentle activities, emotional check-ins, and coordinated device support.
wellness.connectedCareUnavailable: Connected care needs a signed-in account and the VeryLoving service. Local activities and mood history still work on this device.
wellness.scenarioFailed: Connected care could not start or update. Check your connection and try again.

cognitive.title: Cognitive engagement
cognitive.subtitle: Choose a light memory game, a trivia question, or a conversation prompt.
cognitive.connectedBody: Ask your home companion to start a gentle activity and follow its progress here.
cognitive.connectedHint: Starts the cognitive engagement scenario on your account-bound devices.
cognitive.activitySubtitle: There is no score to chase. Pick what feels comfortable today.
cognitive.emptyMessage: Memory, trivia, and conversation are ready whenever you are.

memory.title: Memory cards
memory.description: Notice three symbols, then recall the middle one.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.description: Answer a familiar question at your own pace.

conversation.title: Conversation prompt
conversation.description: Use a warm prompt to recall and share a story.

memory.title: Remember the middle symbol
memory.instruction: Take a moment to look at this sequence.
memory.question: Which symbol was in the middle?
memory.incorrect: Good try. Take another look and go at your own pace.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.incorrect: Not this time—and that is completely okay.

one.prompt: What color is a clear daytime sky?

two.prompt: What is the largest organ of the human body?

three.prompt: How many days are in a week?

prompts.one: What is a meal that brings back a happy memory?
prompts.two: Who taught you something you still use today?
prompts.three: What song always lifts your mood?
prompts.four: What is a place you would enjoy visiting again?

emotional.title: Emotional check-in
emotional.subtitle: Notice how you feel, save a short reflection, or invite your companion to talk.
emotional.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
emotional.moodHint: Choose the closest answer. There is no wrong choice.
emotional.reflectionHint: Keep it brief. Raw voice audio and transcripts are not saved here.
emotional.reflectionPlaceholder: A few words about this moment...
emotional.privacyNote: Your mood history is account-bound, included in privacy export, and removed with account data deletion.
emotional.saveFailed: We could not save this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.connectedBody: Start a consent-aware Hume conversation through your home companion. A user-started check-in never invents a stress reading.
emotional.connectedHint: Starts an emotional check-in on your account-bound home companion.
emotional.historySubtitle: Only your last 90 private check-ins are retained on this device.
emotional.historyLoadFailed: We could not load your check-in history.
emotional.historyEmptyMessage: Choose a mood above when you are ready.
emotional.deleteMessage: This removes the mood and short reflection from this device.
emotional.deleteFailed: We could not delete this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.humeContextNotice: When you start reflection, your selected mood and optional summary are shared as temporary Hume context. They are not treated as a stress reading.

scenarios.title: Connected care scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Coordinate your wearable and home companion with clear safety boundaries.
scenarios.connectedCareBody: VeryLoving resolves your paired devices on the server, prevents duplicate actions, and tracks every execution.
scenarios.demoOffline: Demo mode never creates a bearer token, so connected scenarios stay offline. Sign in with a real development account to test the server flow.
scenarios.signInRequired: Sign in again to use connected care scenarios.
scenarios.notConfigured: Connected care is not configured in this build.
scenarios.networkError: The connected care service could not be reached. Your wearable can still work over Bluetooth.
scenarios.stillRunning: This scenario is still running. Refresh its status shortly.
scenarios.genericError: The connected care action could not be completed. Please retry.
scenarios.chooseActionBody: Actions with safety consequences always explain what will happen before they start.

descriptions.fall_detection: Run an analytics-only practice. It never moves a robot or alerts a contact.
descriptions.medication_adherence: Ask the robot to remind you now; unconfirmed reminders can escalate to a caregiver.
descriptions.emotional_check_in: Invite a calming, consent-aware Hume conversation.
descriptions.cognitive_engagement: Invite a gentle robot activity and voice game.
descriptions.ai_angel_auto_dial: Start the confirmed cross-device emergency flow.

confirmations.practiceBody: This records a practice event only. It will not move the robot, call anyone, or send an emergency alert.
confirmations.medicationBody: The robot will remind you now. If you do not confirm within the adherence window, the configured caregiver escalation can run.
confirmations.emergencyBody: This starts the real emergency workflow across your paired devices and may contact your configured emergency contact.
confirmations.cancelCriticalBody: Stopping a critical scenario can end active emergency steps. Continue only if you are sure help is no longer needed.

scenarios.wellnessToolsBody: Check in privately or choose an activity before involving connected devices.
scenarios.recentActivityBody: Status is encrypted, account-bound, and refreshed while work is active.
scenarios.emptyMessage: Start a wellbeing check-in or another quick action when you are ready.
scenarios.started: Scenario accepted. Live status is updating.
scenarios.fallbackNote: A planned fallback completed because a preferred step was unavailable.
scenarios.failedNote: The scenario could not finish. Check device connectivity and try again if it is safe.

feedback.title: Was this helpful?
feedback.message: Tell us whether %{interaction} supported you. We save only the rating, not a free-text response.
feedback.helpfulHint: Records a thumbs-up rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.notHelpfulHint: Records a thumbs-down rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.error: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
